title: Xyloid Silky Croatian Cod Skewers
description: A low-carb, umami-rich Croatian dish featuring silky cod, perfect for a date night, with a side of fried capers for added crunch.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the cod pieces to the bowl and marinate for 10 minutes.
Thread the marinated cod onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the cod is cooked through.
While the cod is cooking, heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the capers to the saucepan and fry until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Serve the cod skewers hot, garnished with fried capers, parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
